case.title: RAWSON v. WESTERN SAND BLAST CO.

opinion.h: RAWSON v. WESTERN SAND BLAST CO., 194 U.S. 627 (1904)
opinion.p: CHARLES L. RAWSON et al., Petitioners, v. WESTERN SAND BLAST COMPANY et al. No. 168.
Supreme Court of the United States
Messrs. James H. Raymond and Otto R. Barnett for petitioners.
Mr. John W. Munday for respondents.

Decree affirmed, with costs, by a divided court, and cause remanded manded to the circuit court of the United States for the northern district of Illinois. Announced by Mr. Justice Harlan. Mr. Chief Justice Fuller did not sit in this case or take any part in its decision.
